{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211221451D87033699774A6E710D"}"},"total":616},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591505894800671512","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在番茄上的综漫文中算上等了，将伊藤世界观和综漫结合，男主有因为知道旋涡等的存在，得过且过的微死感，情节也不错，就是更的太少了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767537866,"group_id":"7551378330826574872","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzkJCHEwz1bwWfl7E+D9Hu7nktMbEV0/L9643yetIHCU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4452393062776384","user_name":"折木之乡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4452393062776384","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551378330826574872","book_info":{"abstract":"（主角有点不是正常人）（三观有点是正常人）
伊藤润二+综漫世界观+都市传说
简介无力，移步正文
欢迎来到一个融合无数世界观的粪坑。
这是一个魔幻的日常。
阁楼的长发雪之下雪乃，寄生兽比企谷八幡，整个青铜树全部梭哈的芳村艾特……
灭世的漩涡VS小镇里的混沌低语。
热带雨林的庞大巨兽VS海面之下巨大的阴影。
肆无忌惮横行在阿美丽卡的恶魔。
寄生兽？那是什么？
喰种？路边一条野狗？
这里是日常，同样是绝望的世界。
既然如此，为何不摆烂呢？
墨丘利：“反正早晚都要死，对吧，富江。”
富江：“臭弟弟，你会保护姐姐的，不是吗。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a2acc053ccd728c3e343cee0f1b38f14","author":"tewl52","author_id":"","book_id":"7551378330826574872","book_name":"富江姐，漩涡妈，摆烂他","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551703729536238104","read_count":"113218","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"399203"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"196","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/98d66aeadf4de996968765984bc3d455~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250905&x-signature=GPjQDPK3BoLXigdpRLl3rqr%2FDe4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3624463868889515","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"225"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211221451D87033699774A6E710D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":46,"forwarded_count":0
